name: Kahlua Cheesecake Surprise
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Zwieback Crust: Blend 1 1/2 cups fine Zwieback crumbs, 1/3 cup sugar, and melted butter together. Press firmly over the bottom and halfway up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 8 to 10 minutes. Cool.
2. Soften gelatin in Kahlua and water. Beat in egg yolks, sugar, and salt. Cook over boiling water, stirring constantly, until slightly thickened. Gradually beat in the Kahlua mixture. Set aside to cool.
3. Beat cheese until fluffy. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry. Beat cream stiff. Fold egg whites and cream into the cheese mixture.
4. Pour filling into prepared pan. Chill for 4 to 5 hours, or overnight.
5. Remove from refrigerator 15 minutes before serving. Decorate with shaved or curled chocolate. Makes 12 servings (To add flavor, spoon a little Kahlua over each serving).
